profile.name: Gofar Chairulloh Annam
profile.title: Technician & Automation Engineering
profile.bio: IoT Developer, Electrical, Automation, Networking, Industrial Digitalization & Smart Factory enthusiast
profile.about:
A Technician & Automation Engineer specializing in the maintenance, automation, and digitization of industrial dairy processing machinery (MilkLife). Combines expertise in mechanical and electrical systems, PLC programming, and network infrastructure to drive production efficiency.

Key Skills & Experience:

Maintenance & Troubleshooting: Ensuring the reliability of machinery in the processing (IWAI), filling (IPI, Tetra Pak), and packing (Leap Machinery, Tetra Pak) areas to guarantee smooth operations and minimize downtime.

Digitalization & Data Analysis: Developed digital dashboards for production data visualization, including automated breakdown logging and OEE (Equipment & Line) calculations based on PLC tag data.

Industrial Automation: Experienced in modifying PLC program logic and integrating new machines into existing sequences.

Network Infrastructure & IoT: Proficient in industrial network configuration (VLAN, trunking, VPN, fiber optics), and actively developing expertise in Web Development, Electronics, and IoT to support Industry 4.0 implementation.

education.degree: D3 in Electrical Engineering, Major in Telecommunications  | GPA : 3.35 / 4.00
education.description:
• RF, Radar, and Cellular Networks (3G/4G/5G)
• Computer Networking (IP, Subnetting, VLAN, Trunking, OSI Model)
• Fiber Optics
• Antenna Design & VSWR Analysis
• IoT and ESP32 Development
• Web Development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
• Embedded Systems Programming (C/C++, Python)

experience.description:
• Performed preventive and corrective maintenance on dairy processing machinery, including IWAI, IPI, Tetra Pak, and Leap Machinery equipment.
• Conducted preventive electrical maintenance on production machines and electrical control panels to ensure reliable operation and minimize downtime.
• Ensured machine reliability through troubleshooting and continuous improvement activities.
• Modified PLC program logic and integrated new machines into existing production sequences.
• Developed digital dashboards for production monitoring, automated breakdown logging, and OEE calculations based on PLC tag data.
• Configured and maintained industrial network infrastructure, including VLANs, trunking, VPNs, and fiber optic systems.
• Collaborated with production and engineering teams to improve efficiency and support Industry 4.0 initiatives.
